title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Big Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Big Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!
